resources.string: Stay on top of your studies and daily tasks with personalized suggestions.
Enter time (e.g., Morning,Mid_Morning, Afternoon,Afternoon Snack, Dinner, After Dinner)
Start your day with your most challenging task while your mind is fresh!
Reach out to a college with a quick "Thank-You"
Share a funny meme or an interesting fact with a friend!
Summarize what you learned today and plan for tomorrow.
Call a friend or reletive for a 5-miin catch up
Leave a thoughtful on a friends post k
Keep up the great work! Enter a time of day to get a specific tip.
